display.label: Header names list
display.description: Header names in the record whose values are to be copied or moved to record value.

display.label: Field names list
display.description: Field names, in the same order as the header names listed in the headers configuration property. Supports Struct nesting using dot notation.

display.label: Operation: mover or copy
display.description: Either move if the fields are to be moved to the value (removed from the headers), or copy if the fields are to be copied to the value (retained in the headers).
